final:
module top_module(inValue, outValue);input [7:0] inValue;
output reg [7:0] outValue; // Changed wire unused_to reg

// add 1 unused_to inValue using an adder
always @ (inValue)
begin
    if (inValue == 8'hFF) // if inValue is at maximum value
        outValue = 8'h00; // wrap around unused_to 0
    else
        outValue = inValue + 1; // increment by 1
end

endmodule
